backend/main.mo: Defines data models and core social and messaging logic with access control, user profiles, posts, conversations, and related canister methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features to source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Contains prewritten summaries of key frontend files for reference or documentation.
frontend/index.css: Defines global Tailwind CSS variables and theming for light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML entry point loading the React application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up routing, theming, authentication gate, and onboarding logic for the main app.
frontend/src/auth/AuthGate.tsx: Handles authentication gating, showing loading and login screens before rendering children.
frontend/src/auth/LoginButton.tsx: Provides login/logout button with Internet Identity handling and query cache reset.
Renders a single post with author info, caption, and image carousel.
frontend/src/components/states/EmptyStat: Generic empty state component with optional illustration and CTA button.
frontend/src/components/states/ErrorStat: Displays an error message with an optional retry button using an alert layout.
frontend/src/components/states/LoadingSt: Shows a centered loading spinner and optional message.
frontend/src/explore/ExplorePage.tsx: Implements the user search page with search input, user list, follow/unfollow actions, and chat start logic.
frontend/src/feed/FeedPage.tsx: Fetches and displays the user's feed with loading, error, and empty states.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to the user's identity and refreshes dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context, handling login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for backend operations like profiles, search, follow actions, posts, and conversations.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS setup defining themes, color variables, and base styles.
frontend/src/layout/AppLayout.tsx: Defines the main application layout with responsive navigation, header, sidebar, and content areas.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the app with React, React Query, and Internet Identity provider setup.
frontend/src/messages/ChatThreadPage.tsx: Displays a conversation thread, fetching and rendering messages with auto-scroll and a composer for sending new ones.
frontend/src/messages/MessageComposer.ts: Provides a form to compose and send a validated message within a conversation.
frontend/src/messages/MessagesPage.tsx: Lists all conversations and links to each thread, showing loading, error, and empty states.
frontend/src/navigation/PrimaryNav.tsx: Renders the primary navigation bar with active-route highlighting for mobile and desktop layouts.
frontend/src/onboarding/OnboardingPage.t: Handles user onboarding by collecting and validating username and display name before sign‑up.
frontend/src/posts/CreatePostPage.tsx: Allows users to create a post with caption and image URLs, including validation and submission handling.
frontend/src/profile/ProfilePage.tsx: Shows and edits the user's profile with validation, loading states, and save functionality.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides helpers to read URL parameters, persist them in sessionStorage, and remove values from hash-based URLs.
frontend/src/validation/validators.ts: Contains input validators for usernames, display names, captions, image limits, messages, and search terms.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending colors, typography, animations, and layout settings with several plugins enabled.
project_state.json: Stores project metadata, feature statuses, requirements, and image needs for the chat/social app.
